title: Cobblemon: Frontiers
description:
A server mod-pack with all the mods required to join the Cobblemon: Frontiers Server.

Cobblemon: Frontiers is a No Survival competitive  PvE/PvP server with a unique generation zone based world format.
body:
Server:
- Cobblemon: Frontiers is a No Survival competitive  PvE/PvP server with a unique generation   zone based world format.

What Does This Mod-Pack Add?:
- This modpack comes with the essential Mods and Addons for a Cobblemon playthrough, inluding mods that add NPC's and Cosmetics for a fully customizable role-playing experience. As well as a few optomization mods to enhance your frame rate. Additionally this pack includes many cobblemon and pokemon themed resource packs that add a nostalgic pokemon feel to the gameplay, such as new sounds, music, and textures.
